content.query:
CREATE VIEW SLS.Products_BI AS
-- drop view SLS.Products_BI
SELECT 
TRY_CAST([Salsify Item Number] as varchar(4000)) as [Salsify Item Number],
TRY_CAST([M3 Item Number] as varchar(4000)) as [M3 Item Number],
TRY_CAST([Description] as varchar(4000)) as [Description],
TRY_CAST([Status] as varchar(4000)) as [Status],
TRY_CAST([Item Priority] as varchar(4000)) as [Item Priority],
COALESCE(TRY_CAST([Aligned Item Number] as varchar(4000)), TRY_CAST([Salsify Item Number] as varchar(4000))) as [Aligned Item Number],
TRY_CAST([Base Model Item Number] as varchar(4000)) as [Base Model Item Number],
TRY_CAST([Transition To] as varchar(4000)) as [Transition To],
TRY_CAST([Transition From] as varchar(4000)) as [Transition From],
TRY_CAST([Brand Control] as varchar(4000)) as [Brand Control],
TRY_CAST([Sub Brand] as varchar(4000)) as [Sub Brand],
TRY_CAST([Brand] as varchar(4000)) as [Brand],
TRY_CAST([Finance Brand] as varchar(4000)) as [Finance Brand],
TRY_CAST([Division] as varchar(4000)) as [Division],
TRY_CAST([Business Unit] as varchar(4000)) as [Business Unit],
TRY_CAST([Sub Category] as varchar(4000)) as [Sub Category],
TRY_CAST([Category] as varchar(4000)) as [Category],
TRY_CAST([Product Line] as varchar(4000)) as [Product Line],
TRY_CAST([Collection] as varchar(4000)) as [Collection],
TRY_CAST([Item Type] as varchar(4000)) as [Item Type],
TRY_CAST([Procurement Type] as varchar(4000)) as [Procurement Type],
TRY_CAST([UPC] as varchar(4000)) as [UPC],
TRY_CAST([EAN] as varchar(4000)) as [EAN],
TRY_CAST([Exclusivity] as varchar(4000)) as [Exclusivity],
TRY_CAST([Exclusivity 2] as varchar(4000)) as [Exclusivity 2],
TRY_CAST([Exclusivity 3] as varchar(4000)) as [Exclusivity 3],
TRY_CAST([Project Start Date] as date) as [Project Start Date],
TRY_CAST([Launch Date] as date) as [Launch Date],
TRY_CAST([Updated Launch Date] as date) as [Updated Launch Date],
TRY_CAST([Supplier Code] as varchar(4000)) as [Supplier Code],
TRY_CAST([Supplier Name] as varchar(4000)) as [Supplier Name],
TRY_CAST([Supplier Short Name] as varchar(4000)) as [Supplier Short Name],
TRY_CAST([Origin Port] as varchar(4000)) as [Origin Port],
TRY_CAST([Country of Origin] as varchar(4000)) as [Country of Origin],
TRY_CAST([Sourcing Lead Time] as float) as [Sourcing Lead Time],
TRY_CAST([40' HC Qty] as float) as [40' HC Qty],
TRY_CAST([40' GP Qty] as float) as [40' GP Qty],
TRY_CAST([20' GP Qty] as float) as [20' GP Qty],
TRY_CAST([HTS Code] as varchar(4000)) as [HTS Code],
TRY_CAST([US Duty Rate %] as varchar(4000)) as [US Duty Rate %],
TRY_CAST([Canada Duty Rate %] as varchar(4000)) as [Canada Duty Rate %],
TRY_CAST([Trump Tariff %] as varchar(4000)) as [Trump Tariff %],
TRY_CAST([FOB Cost] as float) as [FOB Cost],
TRY_CAST([Origin Port Freight Cost] as float) as [Origin Port Freight Cost],
TRY_CAST([Duty Cost] as float) as [Duty Cost],
TRY_CAST([Estimated Landed Cost] as float) as [Estimated Landed Cost],
TRY_CAST([Item Weight] as float) as [Item Weight],
TRY_CAST([Gift Box Weight] as varchar(4000)) as [Gift Box Weight],
TRY_CAST([Gift Box Length] as varchar(4000)) as [Gift Box Length],
TRY_CAST([Gift Box Width] as varchar(4000)) as [Gift Box Width],
TRY_CAST([Gift Box Height] as varchar(4000)) as [Gift Box Height],
TRY_CAST([Case Pack Quantity] as varchar(4000)) as [Case Pack Quantity],
TRY_CAST([Case Pack Weight] as varchar(4000)) as [Case Pack Weight],
TRY_CAST([Case Pack Length] as varchar(4000)) as [Case Pack Length],
TRY_CAST([Case Pack Width] as varchar(4000)) as [Case Pack Width],
TRY_CAST([Case Pack Height] as varchar(4000)) as [Case Pack Height],
TRY_CAST([Master Pack Quantity] as varchar(4000)) as [Master Pack Quantity],
TRY_CAST([Master Pack Weight] as varchar(4000)) as [Master Pack Weight],
TRY_CAST([Master Pack Length] as varchar(4000)) as [Master Pack Length],
TRY_CAST([Master Pack Width] as varchar(4000)) as [Master Pack Width],
TRY_CAST([Master Pack Height] as varchar(4000)) as [Master Pack Height],
TRY_CAST([Pallet Quantity] as varchar(4000)) as [Pallet Quantity],
TRY_CAST([Pallet Length] as varchar(4000)) as [Pallet Length],
TRY_CAST([Pallet Width] as varchar(4000)) as [Pallet Width],
TRY_CAST([Pallet Height] as varchar(4000)) as [Pallet Height],
TRY_CAST([Pallet Ti/Hi] as varchar(4000)) as [Pallet Ti/Hi],
TRY_CAST([Wholesale Price] as varchar(4000)) as [Wholesale Price],
TRY_CAST([Amazon ASIN] as varchar(4000)) as [Amazon ASIN],
TRY_CAST([Main Image] as varchar(4000)) as [Main Image],
TRY_CAST([Complies with Canadian Laws] as varchar(4000)) as [Complies with Canadian Laws],
TRY_CAST([Customization Available] as varchar(4000)) as [Customization Available],
TRY_CAST([List Price] as varchar(4000)) as [List Price],
TRY_CAST([Shipping Weight] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Shipping Weight],
TRY_CAST([Shipping Length] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Shipping Length],
TRY_CAST([Shipping Width] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Shipping Width],
TRY_CAST([Shipping Height] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Shipping Height],
TRY_CAST([Shipping Quantity] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Shipping Quantity],
TRY_CAST([Primary Warehouse] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Primary Warehouse],
TRY_CAST([Secondary Warehouse 1] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Secondary Warehouse 1],
TRY_CAST([Secondary Warehouse 2] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Secondary Warehouse 2],
TRY_CAST([Country of Steel Smelt] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Country of Steel Smelt],
TRY_CAST([Weight of Steel (KG)] as float) as [Weight of Steel (KG)],
TRY_CAST([Steel ($)] as float) as [Steel ($)],
TRY_CAST([Country of Aluminum Smelt] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Country of Aluminum Smelt],
TRY_CAST([Weight of Aluminum (KG)] as float) as [Weight of Aluminum (KG)],
TRY_CAST([Aluminum ($)] as float) as [Aluminum ($)],
TRY_CAST([Country of Copper Smelt] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Country of Copper Smelt],
TRY_CAST([Weight of Copper (KG)] as float) as [Weight of Copper (KG)],
TRY_CAST([Copper ($)] as float) as [Copper ($)],
TRY_CAST([Section 301 Exclusions] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Section 301 Exclusions],
TRY_CAST([SRP] as float) as [SRP],
TRY_CAST([MAP Price] as float) as [MAP Price],
TRY_CAST([State Restrictions 1] as nvarchar(4000)) as [State Restrictions 1],
TRY_CAST([State Restrictions 2] as nvarchar(4000)) as [State Restrictions 2],
TRY_CAST([State Restrictions 3] as nvarchar(4000)) as [State Restrictions 3],
TRY_CAST([State Restrictions 4] as nvarchar(4000)) as [State Restrictions 4],
TRY_CAST([State Restrictions 5] as nvarchar(4000)) as [State Restrictions 5],

TRY_CAST([AAFES] as nvarchar(4000)) as [AAFES],
TRY_CAST([Abt Electronics & Appliance] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Abt Electronics & Appliance],

TRY_CAST([Cutlery And More] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Cutlery And More],
TRY_CAST([Do It Best Corp] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Do It Best Corp],
TRY_CAST([Electronic Express] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Electronic Express],

TRY_CAST([HSN] as nvarchar(4000)) as [HSN],
TRY_CAST([Hy-Vee Inc] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Hy-Vee Inc],
TRY_CAST([Incentive Concepts, Llc] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Incentive Concepts, Llc],
TRY_CAST([Jack L Marcus Inc] as nvarchar(4000)) as [Jack L Marcus Inc],

FROM
SLS.RAWProdAuto
WHERE [Salsify Item Number] <> 'SKU'
